name: Cashdealbuyers, we buy sell trade luxury watches ,Rolex, jewelry, designer hand bags ,coins & antiques
description_short: Cash Deal Buyers is a luxury goods pawn and resale shop specializing in high-end watches, jewelry, handbags, and precious metals with locations across California, New York, and Florida.
description_long:
Cash Deal Buyers operates as a specialized pawn and luxury goods buyer with physical locations in Beverly Hills, California and additional offices across New York and Florida. The company positions itself as a buyer, seller, and trader of high-end merchandise including luxury watches (particularly Rolex), fine jewelry, designer handbags, precious metals, coins, and antiques. Their business model centers on acquiring valuable items from consumers at appraised prices and reselling them through their retail operation.

The company offers multiple services including watch and jewelry appraisals conducted by claimed expert gemologists using industry-standard techniques. They explicitly advertise buying and selling luxury handbags from brands like Louis Vuitton, Hermès, Chanel, and Gucci. Cash Deal Buyers also provides collateral-based loan options on assets, positioning themselves as a financing alternative. Their Beverly Hills location at 8383 Wilshire Boulevard serves as their primary point of contact, with phone lines accepting calls 24 hours and allowing customers to submit photos of merchandise prior to in-person visits.

What distinguishes Cash Deal Buyers is their focus on ultra-premium merchandise categories rather than general pawn shop inventory. They explicitly target customers with luxury goods seeking immediate cash and those looking to purchase authenticated designer items. The multi-state presence across California, New York, and Florida suggests an established retail network, and their Beverly Hills location signals positioning toward an upscale clientele.

However, the website lacks critical consumer-protection information. There is no disclosure of loan terms, interest rates (APR), repayment periods, or fees associated with their stated loan options. No mention of licensing, regulatory compliance, or consumer protection policies appears on the site. The business hours show "By Appointment" with a caveat about 24-hour calling, creating uncertainty about actual accessibility. The website contains minor spelling inconsistencies ("2026" copyright) and lacks detailed authentication protocols for high-value goods, which is critical for luxury item sales.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multi-location operation across three states (California, New York, Florida) providing geographic accessibility
Expert gemologist appraisals for jewelry and diamonds using industry-standard assessment techniques
Specializes in authenticated luxury brand handbags (Louis Vuitton, Hermès, Chanel, Gucci) rather than generic goods
Accepts photo submissions before in-person appointments, allowing remote valuation inquiries
24-hour phone availability for customer inquiries and merchandise inquiries
Explicitly offers collateral-based loan options on assets for those needing short-term financing
Established Beverly Hills retail location signaling operational stability and upscale positioning
cons: No disclosure of loan terms, APR, fees, or repayment periods for stated loan options
Unclear authentication and verification protocols for high-value luxury goods despite handling premium items
Business hours listed as "By Appointment" only, reducing accessibility compared to standard retail hours
Missing regulatory licensing information, compliance disclosures, or consumer protection policies on website
No transparency on pricing methodology, buyback margins, or valuation justification process
best_for: Owners of luxury watches (especially Rolex) seeking immediate cash through sale or collateral loan
High-net-worth individuals with designer handbags and jewelry needing rapid liquidation
Buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned luxury goods at potentially discounted prices
Consumers in California, New York, or Florida needing short-term asset-backed financing
diagnosis: Cash Deal Buyers is best suited for consumers with luxury goods (watches, jewelry, designer handbags) in California, New York, or Florida who need immediate cash and trust the Beverly Hills pawn/resale model. The main caveat is the complete absence of loan term transparency—if using their stated loan options, customers must call to learn APR, fees, and repayment terms before committing, as this critical information is not disclosed online.
services: Buy luxury watches including Rolex models
Buy and sell luxury handbags (Louis Vuitton, Hermès, Chanel, Gucci brands)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8383 Wilshire Blvd Suite108, Beverly Hills, CA 90211
